arts.ttl: Girona announce concerning double injury blow
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Girona have on Tuesday announced a double personnel blow in the club’s first-team squad. This comes owing to developments in the club’s weekend meeting with Celta Vigo.…

arts.ttl: Girona vs Feyenoord predictions: Feyenoord can spring a surprise in Spain
arts.sum: Gareth Freeman says Feyenoord have a chance to pull off a minor upset when they face La Liga outfit Girona in the Champions League on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Eredivisie Podcast | When do Feyenoord sack Priske? Can Ajax challenge PSV for the title?
arts.sum: Football-Oranje’s Michael Statham and Mike Bell catch up on a new audio-only Eredivisie podcast. Thank you for watching, liking and commenting. Our show is available on SoundCloud, Apple Podcasts, or many other free podcast apps!
